'''Jagga II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Venjagga system/Legends|Venjagga system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. Even after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Jagga II produced [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was later a strategic world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
{{Planet-stub}}
